name: SIIX Corporation
summary: SIIX Corporation engages in the parts procurement, logistics, trading, and electronics manufacturing services in Japan and internationally. It handles components, modules, circuit board mountings, finished articles, etc. that are incorporated in products used in automobile related equipment, industrial devices, household electrical appliances, information equipment, general electronic parts, and others. The company also offers design for manufacturability technical support services; and design for localization services. In addition, it offers various logistics services, including kitting, vendor managed inventory, and just in time to support the inventory management systems; and joint design and manufacturing services. SIIX Corporation was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
